top_signals.title: House Passes War Powers Measure on Iran, But Trump Will Likely Kill It
top_signals.summary: The House voted 215-208 on Wednesday to direct President Donald Trump to withdraw U.S. forces from the Iran conflict, with four Republicans crossing the aisle in the most significant congressional pushback on Operation Epic Fury since the war began Feb. 28. The resolution, introduced by Rep. Gregory Meeks (D-N.Y.), invokes the 1973 War Powers Act and directs Trump to remove U.S. armed forces from hostilities with Iran unless Congress formally declares war or authorizes the use of military force. Under the Act, Trump now has 30 days to comply, unless…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Won Falls to 2009 Low Even as Korea Pledges Action
top_signals.summary: The South Korean won fell to the lowest since 2009 even as the government pledged to curb excessive volatility, underscoring the pressure some Asian currencies face as the Iran war drags on.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Reliance Traders Said to Game Plan in Case RBI Raises Rates
top_signals.summary: Traders in Reliance Industries Ltd.’s treasury department are strategizing over where to park the company’s cash in case the Reserve Bank of India starts raising interest rates in the coming months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Oxane Partners’ ‘Compass 2026’ Maps Private Credit Market Sentiments
top_signals.summary: Survey of 380+ senior credit professionals highlights industry’s outlook for growth of assets, with inclination towards ABF, AI, and risk discipline
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Live markets: Bitcoin selloff stalls as key indicator signals oversold conditions
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
